title: Merle Toys® Wooden Stacking Rings – 100% FSC-Certified Rainbow Stacker Toy with 8 Safe, Rounded Rings, Montessori Wooden Stacking Toys for 1 Year Old Boys & Girls, Boosts Motor Skills, Color Learning
features: FUN & CREATIVE RING STACK – Whether stacking, sorting, or free building, the ring stacker toy sparks imagination and provides hours of playtime fun
PROMOTES CHILD DEVELOPMENT – Our wooden rainbow stacker is a baby stacking toy that playfully supports your child’s creativity, fine motor skills, and concentration from an early age.

AWARDED WITH THE SPIEL GUT SEAL – The stacking tower for 1-year-olds has been honored with the prestigious German Spiel Gut seal. Guaranteed educational quality and safety – the perfect wooden toy for your child's development!

LARGE & SMOOTHLY ROUNDED PIECES – Our Wooden Stacker is made from 100% FSC-certified, splinter-free beechwood and painted with safe, water-based colors. Wooden Baby Toys TÜV tested according to DIN EN71 and REACH standards – for worry-free play and maximum safety
PERFECT BABY GIFT – For boys and girls, packaged in a high-quality, sturdy cardboard box. Surprise your child with a wooden toys for 1 year old that brings imagination to life!

CONTENTS – 1x wooden shape sorter for 1 year old (9 pieces) made of 100% FSC-certified beechwood, dimensions: 7.3 inches tall, 4.7 inches diameter, weight: 1.96 lbs – durable, sustainable, and perfect for little hands!
description: Product Description Is the Merle Toys Stacking Tower safe for my child? The stacking tower meets the DIN EN 71 standard (tested by TÜV SÜD in 2023) and is ideal for children aged 1 and up. With large pieces, non-toxic water-based colors, and rounded edges, we ensure the highest level of safety for carefree play. Why is our Stacking Tower an educational toy? The stacking tower improves fine motor skills through precise grasping and placing of the wooden rings, enhances concentration through careful stacking, and develops logical thinking by sorting the rings from largest to smallest. What kind of finish does our Stacking Tower have? Our stacking tower has a solid, slightly glossy, and highly durable lacquer finish.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Logical Thinking, Dexterity, Hand-Eye Coordination, Colour Recognition, Stacking Skills, Concentration, Size Recognition Skills, Cognitive Development
